# sanctionwise

> Verified UK sanctions screening for AI agents. Screens a person/company/vessel name against the
> official FCDO UK Sanctions List and returns ranked POSSIBLE matches with the official designation
> details (regime, sanctions imposed, statement of reasons), or a clean no-match — from official data,
> not the model's memory. Ships as an MCP server and a typed TypeScript library. By Qiniso — verified,
> trustworthy data tools for AI agents.

## What it does
- screen_name: screen a name → ranked POSSIBLE matches (accent/case-insensitive; screens aliases) with official designation details.
- get_sanctions_entry: full official UK Sanctions List entry for a Unique ID.

## CRITICAL limits (must convey to users)
- INDICATIVE name-match ONLY. A match is a POSSIBLE match requiring human verification against the official entry — NOT confirmation that this is the designated party.
- A "no match" is NOT a clearance: UK (FCDO) list ONLY (no EU/US-OFAC/UN), screens the supplied name string only (not DOB/aliases not passed), and reflects the dataset's report date, not real-time.
- Not legal, compliance, KYC/AML or sanctions advice; not a substitute for a regulated screening process. Every response carries this disclaimer.

## Why
LLMs can't recall who is currently sanctioned (it changes constantly, ~6,200 entries, dozens of regimes). sanctionwise returns the official FCDO designation by lookup, or an honest no-match.

## Data
Official FCDO UK Sanctions List (designated persons/entities/ships under the Sanctions and Anti-Money Laundering Act 2018), Open Government Licence v3.0, © Crown copyright. Parsed into one record per target (names/aliases grouped) and BUNDLED in the package (offline fallback); the tool also auto-refreshes from a weekly-updated GitHub Release on startup (cached locally, no token, no manual step). Every response reports the dataset's report date.

## Install
- Local MCP: npx -y sanctionwise   (data bundled; no key)
- Library: npm install sanctionwise

## Links
- Repo: https://github.com/qinisolabs/sanctionwise
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/sanctionwise
- Official list: https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/the-uk-sanctions-list
- License: Apache-2.0 (code); data © Crown copyright, FCDO, OGL v3.0
